business.name: Rays Auto Electric
business.tagline: Starters, alternators, and honest answers — since day one

hero.headline: When your starter quits, *we rebuild it right*
hero.subheadline: Dale's been fixing what others throw away for decades. Your alternator breaks, we make it better than new.

services_section.label: THE REBUILD
services_section.heading: We fix what breaks under the hood
services_section.subheading: Starters and alternators rebuilt better than factory spec

services.title: Alternator Rebuild
services.description: Your charging system dies, we bring it back to life. Cleaned, painted, tested — looks and runs like new.

services.title: Starter Repair
services.description: Won't turn over? We rebuild starters for less than what the parts stores charge for new ones.

services.title: Electrical Diagnosis
services.description: Lights acting weird? Brake lights out? We'll show you what's wrong and how to fix it.

services.title: Marine Electrical
services.description: Boat alternators rebuilt and ready for the water. We know marine electrical inside and out.

about.heading: Dale knows every wire in Chattanooga
about.body: Ray's Auto Electric has been the go-to shop for rebuilt starters and alternators in Chattanooga for years. Dale and his team don't just fix electrical problems — they teach you what went wrong and how to prevent it next time. When everyone else wants to sell you new parts, we rebuild what you have for half the price.

reviews.name: Toby D.
reviews.text: Asked about a brake light issue. Instead of booking me, they took time to teach me how to fix it myself. Super friendly and helpful.

reviews.name: Chris N.
reviews.text: Known Dale my whole life. He's rebuilt alternators on several of my cars and plenty of friends' cars. The only place I trust.

reviews.name: Stacy W.
reviews.text: Got my boat alternator rebuilt for under eighty bucks when everyone else wanted way more. Fast, reasonable, and they made it look new.

reviews.name: Joe C.
reviews.text: They rebuilt my alternator 5 years ago and it's still running strong. Better prices than the chain stores every time.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving the greater Chattanooga area
service_areas.subheading: Fast electrical repair throughout Hamilton County

cta.heading: Your electrical problem has a solution
cta.body: Before you buy new, let us rebuild what you have. Call Dale and get an honest answer about what needs fixing.
